title: 3.5 Metre Hose Clamps, Jeboler 304 Stainless Steel Hose Clamp, Hole Tape, Metal with 10 Pieces Attachment, DIY Hose Tie Set, Hose Clamp for Pool, Washing Machine, Cooler and Garden
features: 【Adjustable DIY Hose Clamp】Total length of hose clips: 3.5 meters, equipped with 10 fasteners, you can cut the metal strap to the appropriate length as needed.
【304 Stainless Steel Clamp】Hose clips is made of 304 stainless steel, with bright texture, high hardness, corrosion resistance, strong anti-oxidation ability and durable.
【Strong Metal Clamp Strapping】The adjustable worm gear band has a strong clamping force and a firm locking structure, which can fix the hose and effectively prevent leakage.
【Easy to install】First cut to fit metal strap to the correct size, then install the accessories on the screw clamp, and finally tighten the screw of the pipe clamp with a flat screwdriver.

【Wide Application】Adjustable metal band screw clamp can be used to connect pipes, water pipes, water tanks, automotive oil pipes, gas pipes, radiators. Suitable for automotive, industrial and household fields.
description: Product Description Jeboler hose clamps stainless steel pipe repair clamp pipe clamp cut to fit metal strap metal band screw clamp straps for pipe,duct,tube.
